results.title: How to get help in Windows - Microsoft Support
results.snippet: Here are a few different ways to find help for Windows Search for help - Enter a question or keywords in the search box on the taskbar to find apps, files, settings, and get help from the web.

results.title: Microsoft Support
results.snippet: Microsoft Support is here to help you with Microsoft products. Find how-to articles, videos, and training for Microsoft Copilot, Microsoft 365, Windows 11, Surface, and more.

results.snippet: Contact Microsoft Support. Find solutions to common problems, or get help from a support agent.

results.title: Windows help and learning - support.microsoft.com
results.snippet: Find help and how-to articles for Windows operating systems. Get support for Windows and learn about installation, updates, privacy, security and more.
